MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARKETTOOLS, INC'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. Appearances: Richard J. Vaznaugh of the Law Office of Richard J. Vaznaugh (593.0076) for plaintiff and responding party; Joshua O. Mates of Cooley Godward Kronish LLP (650.843.5084) for defendant and moving party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Court finds good cause to enter defendant's order but strikes the confidentiality agreement exhibit a. Order signed.
